title: Ready to go wild this weekend
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - It’s all systems go for the 22nd annual SPAR Kirkwood Wildsfees.","html":"ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - It’s all systems go for the 22nd annual SPAR Kirkwood Wildsfees."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"What was empty scrubland a few weeks ago, is now an eight hectare fenced, cleared, levelled and covered platform for the Eastern Cape’s favourite family festival."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Community volunteers from across the town have also been hard at work ensuring that the town is looking its best.","html":"Community volunteers from across the town have also been hard at work ensuring that the town is looking its best."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sunny Karoo skies are predicted for the festival weekend, from Friday 27 June to Sunday 29 June.","html":"Sunny Karoo skies are predicted for the festival weekend, from Friday 27 June to Sunday 29 June."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Highlights","html":"Highlights"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Festival highlights include the Walk on the Wildside experience featuring interactive exhibits and activities, agri, outdoor and new vehicle expos, working dog and horse demonstrations, wild rides in the Family Play Park, pony rides, paintball, bungee bounce, pedal-go karting and meeting cosplay fictional characters.","html":"Festival highlights include the Walk on the Wildside experience featuring interactive exhibits and activities, agri, outdoor and new vehicle expos, working dog and horse demonstrations, wild rides in the Family Play Park, pony rides, paintball, bungee bounce, pedal-go karting and meeting cosplay fictional characters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There will be over 300 specialist stalls selling handcrafts, décor items, clothing and freshly prepared delicacies.","html":"There will be over 300 specialist stalls selling handcrafts, décor items, clothing and freshly prepared delicacies."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Also enjoy wine tastings and “lekker kuiers” at the Be-Dingus Bar, Dam Duikers Draai, ATKV Kalmeerkraal, Coca-Cola Kos Kraal, Castle Corner, LITEnUP Bar and Lagerville Watergat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Big stars on stage","html":"Big stars on stage"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visitors will be entertained by over 30 national stars appearing live on the giant Wildsfees stage.","html":"Visitors will be entertained by over 30 national stars appearing live on the giant Wildsfees stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Friday’s line-up starts at 16:00 with Ruan van der Kuil, with Spoegwolf as the headline act at 21:00.","html":"Friday’s line-up starts at 16:00 with Ruan van der Kuil, with Spoegwolf as the headline act at 21:00."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"On Saturday the music starts at 13:30 with local legend Patrick Lindoor, and climaxes with former local Ruhan du Toit and Kurt Darren from 22:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sunday’s entertainment begins at 11:00 with Wynand and Cheree, and Blackbyrd plays the festival out from 14:30.","html":"Sunday’s entertainment begins at 11:00 with Wynand and Cheree, and Blackbyrd plays the festival out from 14:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Traditional food and entertainment","html":"Traditional food and entertainment"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lovers of traditional sheep’s head, tripe or a mutton potjie will dine at the Lekker Lang Lamtafel while enjoying traditional Afrikaans entertainment.","html":"Lovers of traditional sheep’s head, tripe or a mutton potjie will dine at the Lekker Lang Lamtafel while enjoying traditional Afrikaans entertainment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The dog and horse demos will be held in the MTN Arena on all three days, along with a demonstration by the SANParks K-9 anti-poaching unit on the Saturday.","html":"The dog and horse demos will be held in the MTN Arena on all three days, along with a demonstration by the SANParks K-9 anti-poaching unit on the Saturday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Visitors to the Walk on the Wildside marquee will be able to plan their next break by finding out more about 19 of the province’s top holiday and adventure destinations.","html":"Visitors to the Walk on the Wildside marquee will be able to plan their next break by finding out more about 19 of the province’s top holiday and adventure destinations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sarah Baartman District Tourism, Eastern Cape Parks and Tourism (ECPTA) and Addo Tourism will connect visitors with all the attractions the area, including the Sundays River Valley, has to offer.","html":"Sarah Baartman District Tourism, Eastern Cape Parks and Tourism (ECPTA) and Addo Tourism will connect visitors with all the attractions the area, including the Sundays River Valley, has to offer."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"There will also be fossil digs for the young and dinosaur virtual reality experiences, snake, spider and tortoise demonstrations by Mark Marshall of Sandula Conservation and his team, the Iziko Mobile Museum, and the launch of a new tourism product by Small Town South Africa."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The conservation minded will be able to leave a message on the Tree of Life, made from recycled cardboard by APL Cartons Packaging and decorated with household waste.","html":"The conservation minded will be able to leave a message on the Tree of Life, made from recycled cardboard by APL Cartons Packaging and decorated with household waste."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous article:","html":"Previous article: "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stage set for SPAR Kirkwood Wildsfees","html":"Stage set for SPAR Kirkwood Wildsfees"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Ready to go wild this weekend
